what_was_fixed: Codex-era autopoc orchestrator was a DESTRUCTIVE STUB: ran the DELETE but skipped the helper CALL, so migration drifted ~30 days behind gold (149.2M vs 150.3M rows).
Rebuilt sp_fact_firstcustomeraction_autopoc (helper) resolving LOCAL_VARIABLE_IN_TEMP_OBJECT_DEFINITION by inlining the deduped FirstActions set into both MERGE USING subqueries.
Repointed sp_fact_firstcustomeraction_dl_to_synapse_autopoc to actually CALL the helper. Proc deploys and runs cleanly (19s).

diagnosis.source_identical: Fact_CustomerAction 05-23 slice is bit-identical mig vs gold (408,207 HistoryIDs / 603,931 rows).
diagnosis.baseline_reseeded: Migration baseline (DateID<=20260522) was INSERT OVERWRITE-reseeded from gold; the 05-23 output was byte-for-byte identical before and after reseed, ruling out baseline staleness.
diagnosis.extra_combos_absent_in_gold: All 801 extra (ActionTypeID,GCID) first-ever combos are absent from gold entirely (any FirstEver, any date).
diagnosis.extra_combos_have_earlier_source_actions: All 801 combos have an earlier action of the same ActionTypeID in source Fact_CustomerAction (DateID<20260523), so they are NOT truly first on 05-23.
diagnosis.gcids_in_dim_customer: All 801 GCIDs are present in Dim_Customer, so it is not a valid-customer join filter.
diagnosis.root_cause: The transpiled migration_tables proc determines 'first ever' by ABSENCE FROM THE TARGET TABLE (incremental MERGE WHEN NOT MATCHED). Gold's production proc determines first-ever by GLOBAL-FIRST-OCCURRENCE over full source history. Combos whose earlier actions were never recorded (gold systematically excludes them) get wrongly re-claimed as first-on-05-23 by the transpiled proc.

why_parked: Faithful reproduction requires gold's production proc source (not available in migration_tables; the transpiled version is a simplified/incremental approximation) OR recomputing first-ever via a full-history scan of the 11.7B-row Fact_CustomerAction per run (prohibitive). This is an upstream proc-logic gap, not a SQL-dialect or baseline defect. Proc is deployed and runnable.
table_state: Restored to clean gold baseline (DateID<=20260522); tainted 05-23 run (20,573 rows) deleted.
guardrail: 5-pass; resolved at pass 2 with definitive root cause.
